stories.title: World Cup LIVE: Dembélé hat trick gives France con...
Fever coach thanks WNBA review, but scolds refs
stories.summary: Stephanie White is glad the WNBA review punished Alyssa Thomas for her hit to Caitlin Clark's throat, but the Fever coach wonders how refs failed to make a call in real time.

stories.title: CFL won't allow Brendan Sorsby to join league
stories.summary: The CFL says quarterback Brendan Sorsby will not be allowed to join any of its teams for the upcoming season.

stories.title: Sources: Poch in positive talks over USMNT deal
stories.summary: United States men's national team coach Mauricio Pochettino and U.S. Soccer have had positive talks about a possible contract extension, sources told ESPN.

stories.title: Bulls' Wilson expects to win Rookie of the Year
stories.summary: New Bulls forward Caleb Wilson was asked about his expectations for his debut season, and he set his sights on Rookie of the Year.
